title: School assignment: introduction
description: Real school assignment opening at speed
text: In this essay, I will examine the role of social media in shaping how teenagers communicate, learn, and form their identity, with a focus on both the positive and negative impacts seen over the past five years.

character_tips.anna: Block 5 — real school writing. This is what you'll type for years.
character_tips.maxim: Essay introductions are a daily-life format. Train them well.
character_tips.klavochka: Sharing what you know with words, my dear 📖
